_readme: GitHub MCP server — enables Claude to read/write issues, PRs, repos, and code via the GitHub API. Requires a GitHub Personal Access Token.
_setup: 1. Create a GitHub PAT at https://github.com/settings/tokens (scopes: repo, read:org)
2. Set the token as an env var: export GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_your_token
3. Paste the 'mcpServers' block below into your .claude/settings.json
